hero.title: Universal AI Search MCP
hero.subtitle: Zero API keys. Direct scraping. Perplexity-level answers with inline citations. All MCP clients supported.

stats.subtitle: Everything runs locally. No cloud LLM. No paid search API.

comparison.subtitle: Not just another search wrapper. A full research engine.

pipeline.title: 7-Phase Deep Research Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Not a search wrapper. A research engine.

ranking.title: BM25 beats raw search ranking
ranking.subtitle: Search engines sort by ads & SEO. We sort by relevance.
ranking.whyDesc: BM25 scores content density, authority domains get +2.0, fresh pages +1.5, code-heavy pages +1.0. Search engines can't do this without access to page content.

free.title: 100% Free
free.desc: No OpenAI, Google API, Bing API. Only direct scraping.

citations.title: Citation-Native
citations.desc: Every result gets [1], [2] IDs. LLMs cite sources accurately.

multi.title: Multi-Engine
multi.desc: SearchEngineRegistry makes adding new scrapers trivial.

code.title: Code-Aware
code.desc: 21-language detection, API signature extraction, code-text ratio.

freshness.title: Freshness Scoring
freshness.desc: htmldate extraction, stale content warnings, auto year-injection.

tools.title: 8 Tools
tools.desc: From quick answers to deep research.

codeShowcase.title: Perplexity-level answers, zero API cost
codeShowcase.subtitle: One line of Python. No OpenAI bill.
codeShowcase.code1:
from maru_search.tools import answer

result = answer('What is quantum error correction?')
print(result)
# => Answer with [1], [2] inline citations
codeShowcase.code2:
from maru_search.research.deep import deep_research

report = deep_research('Solid state battery 2024')
# Auto-expands queries, crawls top results,
# synthesizes cited report within token budget
codeShowcase.code3:
from maru_search.tools import search_with_citations

sources = search_with_citations('LLM context window scaling')
# Returns pre-numbered [1]-[N] sources
# Ready for academic paper insertion

footer.built: Built with 100% open source, 0% API keys
